creator: robin@isometry.net
text:
Created attachment 203219
shar of the new port

In the spirit of the existing, versioned grafana{,2,3,4,5} ports, attached is a tested and functional port of the latest Grafana v6.0.2.

I have left the maintainer the same as for the other grafana* ports, swills@FreeBSD.org, but if Steve doesn't wish to take on this port then I am happy to take responsibility.
